source_rationale: RGS5 is a canonical marker of pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a defining marker of smooth muscle cells and pericytes
TAGLN (transgelin/SM22) is a smooth muscle-specific cytoskeletal protein marking pericytes/SMCs
MYH11 (smooth muscle myosin heavy chain) is a definitive smooth muscle cell marker
NOTCH3 is a key pericyte/mural cell marker involved in vascular development
MCAM (CD146) is expressed on pericytes and perivascular cells
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells regulating calcium signaling
GJA4 (Connexin37) is a gap junction protein expressed in vascular mural cells
MYL9 is a smooth muscle myosin light chain marking contractile perivascular cells
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene highly expressed in pericytes
CD3D is a core T cell receptor complex component, definitive T cell marker
CD3E is essential for T cell receptor signaling and identifies T lymphocytes
GZMK marks effector memory CD8+ T cells and NK cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by activated/effector T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein marking activated T cells and NK cells
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T lymphocytes
IL7R (CD127) marks memory T cells and is key for T cell homeostasis
KLRB1 (CD161) marks NKT cells and mucosal-associated invariant T cells
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated Th1 and cytotoxic T cells
Granulysin is a cytolytic protein in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell marker
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene in fibroblasts
Collagen type I alpha 2 is produced by fibroblasts for ECM assembly
Complement C1s is secreted by stromal fibroblasts in many tissues
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed in stromal/fibroblast populations
Midkine is a growth factor expressed in ovarian theca/stromal fibroblasts
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan marking stromal fibroblasts
StAR is involved in steroidogenesis, suggesting ovarian theca-interstitial stromal cells
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts remodeling ECM
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelial cells
CD34 is a classic endothelial and hematopoietic progenitor marker
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor involved in angiogenesis
CLEC14A is a C-type lectin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
Aquaporin-1 is expressed on vascular endothelial cells
NOSTRIN is an endothelial nitric oxide synthase trafficking protein specific to endothelium
PALMD is enriched in endothelial cells and involved in vascular biology
Carbonic anhydrase 4 is expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells
Anti-Müllerian hormone is produced by granulosa cells of ovarian follicles
WFDC2 (HE4) is expressed in ovarian epithelial/granulosa cells
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells
Keratin 8 is a simple epithelial marker found in granulosa cells
TNNI3 has been reported as upregulated in ovarian granulosa cells
GSTA1 is a detoxification enzyme expressed in granulosa cells
EMX2 is a transcription factor involved in ovarian/reproductive tract development
Desmoplakin is a cell junction protein marking epithelial granulosa cells
HES1 is a Notch target transcription factor active in granulosa cell differentiation
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is expressed in ovarian granulosa cells
WNT6 signaling is involved in granulosa cell proliferation and follicle development
MHC class II expression indicates antigen-presenting immune cells
Complement C1q subunit marks tissue-resident macrophages
CD14 is a monocyte/macrophage lineage marker
Lysozyme is highly expressed in monocytes and macrophages
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/microglia marker
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein in myeloid cell signaling
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid cells
FCER1A marks dendritic cells, suggesting this may be a mixed myeloid/DC cluster
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine produced by activated macrophages
NKG7 expression alongside myeloid markers suggests activated immune cells with cytotoxic features
CD163 is a scavenger receptor defining tissue-resident M2-like macrophages
C1QA is highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
C1QB complement component marks resident macrophages
LYVE1 is a marker of tissue-resident perivascular macrophages
FOLR2 marks tissue-resident anti-inflammatory macrophages
Stabilin-1 is expressed on alternatively activated tissue macrophages
MS4A7 is a monocyte/macrophage lineage marker
CSF1R (CD115) is the macrophage colony-stimulating factor receptor
Lysozyme is a hallmark myeloid/macrophage gene
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by activated macrophages
Cathepsin S is a lysosomal protease enriched in macrophages for antigen processing
Zona pellucida glycoprotein 3 is an oocyte-specific marker
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene marking oocytes
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein essential for early development
OOSP2 is an oocyte-secreted protein specific to female germ cells
KPNA7 is an importin alpha preferentially expressed in oocytes
GTSF1 is a gametocyte-specific factor involved in piRNA pathway in germ cells
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte development
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor expressed in oocytes
UCHL1 is highly expressed in oocytes and involved in protein quality control
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell marker
Alpha smooth muscle actin defines smooth muscle cells and pericytes
Transgelin is a smooth muscle-specific cytoskeletal protein
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain is a definitive SMC marker
Myosin light chain 9 marks contractile smooth muscle/pericyte cells
NOTCH3 is a pericyte/mural cell receptor important for vascular integrity
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker
S100A4 expression distinguishes this cluster from CLUSTER 1, suggesting a more activated/migratory pericyte state
SOD3 is expressed in vascular smooth muscle cells and distinguishes this from CLUSTER 1
Phospholamban regulates calcium handling in smooth muscle cells
Decorin is a hallmark stromal fibroblast proteoglycan
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell receptor
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major fibroblast ECM product
Osteoglycin marks stromal fibroblasts in connective tissue
StAR mediates steroidogenesis, indicating theca-interstitial stromal identity
APOE expression distinguishes this stromal cluster from CLUSTER 2, suggesting a distinct fibroblast subtype
Claudin-11 is expressed in ovarian stromal cells
FHL2 is a transcriptional coactivator enriched in this stromal population versus CLUSTER 2
Complement C7 is produced by stromal fibroblasts
HTRA1 is a serine protease expressed in ovarian stromal/theca cells
